headline: Oscars? Disney Doesn't Need No Stinkin' Oscar.
summary: The iconic studio collected just one of the 22 Oscars handed out over the weekend. It's not a big deal.

raw.headline: Oscars? Disney Doesn't Need No Stinkin' Oscar.
raw.summary: The iconic studio collected just one of the 22 Oscars handed out over the weekend. It's not a big deal.

headline: Warner Bros. triumphs at Oscars amid pending sale to Paramount
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) cleaned up at the 98th Academy Awards — winning a record 11 Oscars — amid the studio's pending sale to Paramount Skydance (PSKY). Puck founding partner William D. Cohan sits down with Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman to talk about the Ellison family's push to acquire the media giant, the deal currently priced at $110 billion.

headline: Warner Bros. Cleans Up at the Oscars. Why It Bodes Well for the Paramount Takeover.
summary: “One Battle After Another” and “Sinners” landed 10 Oscars between them, and Amy Madigan won best supporting actress.

headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Bags 11 Oscars As $110 Billion Paramount Skydance Sale Looms
summary: In the midst of nearly a $110 billion sale to Paramount Skydance (NASDAQ: PSKY), Warner Bros. Discovery (NASDAQ:WBD) has triumphed at the 98th Academy Awards, taking home 11 Oscars.

raw.headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Bags 11 Oscars As $110 Billion Paramount Skydance Sale Looms

headline: Oscars success for Warner Bros at uncertain time for its future
summary: Paramount and Netflix had been involved in a bidding war over Warner Bros.

raw.headline: Oscars success for Warner Bros at uncertain time for its future

headline: Warner Bros. Was the Night’s Biggest Winner
summary: Hollywood’s biggest winner across the board wasn’t actually nominated. Warner Bros. studio released both of the films that dominated: “One Battle After Another” (six wins, including best picture) and “Sinners” (four).
